series_metadata.series_title: Returned driver license and state identification (DL/ID) cards
series_metadata.series_description: This series contains all driver license and state identification (DL/ID) cards which are returned for a second time to the Ohio Bureau of Motor Vehicles (BMV) as undeliverable. As a result, electronic files are generated in the Business Application Services System during the scanning process.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: ninety (90) days from second time card is returned BMV as undeliverable. ; Electronic: ninety (90) days from second time card is returned BMV as undeliverable
